rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And For Motion For Leave To Augment Expert Witness List And Reopen Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 1. PLAINTIFFS GARRITT BLANZ and DAVID BLANZ's Motion For Leave To Augment Expert Witness List And Reopen Discovery Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on April 30, 2019 specifying exactly how the testimony provided by new expert differs from previously disclosed experts. Disclosure language to be included in the supplemental brief. No further argument is allowed. The brief (excluding disclosure excerpts) shall not exceed 1 page. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF GARRITT BLANZ and DAVID BLANZ's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Points and Authorities filed in support of this motion are 16 pages long (there are 17 pages, but the first and the last pages are partial), do not contain table of contents or table of authorities. Additionally eight of sixteen pages are single-spaced. Therefore, points and authorities are stricken. In the absence of points and authorities the motion is incomplete. CRC 3.1113, 3.1112 = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene By United States Liability Insurance Company On Behalf Of Dauntless, Llc; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Juliet M. Lompa In Support; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 2. INTERVENOR UNITED STATES LIABILITY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave To Intervene By United States Liability Insurance Company On Behalf Of Dauntless, LLC GRANTED, no opposition filed. Complaint in intervention to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OMAR SHAFIE VS. MEGHAN MCGARRY DANGANAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Of Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 3. PLAINTIFF OMAR SHAFIE's Motion To Vacate Order Of Dismissal OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion served by e-service 16 court days before the hearing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES SALES VS. BANK OF AMERICA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 4. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of claims against the Defendant. All causes of action shall be clearly labeled and all allegations must be made in clear and concise language. The Court notes that Plaintiff's handwriting is illegible making it difficult to understand the minimal allegations currently contained in the Complaint. Further, unless any amended complaint contains a real property claim, all future motions shall be made in department 302. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Separate Statement; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 5. DEFENDANT LYUDMILA KOPETMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 6. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA R. MARTINEZ VS. GEORGE RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2019, line 7. DEFENDANTs GEORGE RAMIREZ, WANDA MEZA-RAMIREZ and ESPERANZA MEZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege in good faith all elements of a cause of action entitling Plaintiff to recover possession, e.g. CCP 1159, 1160, 1161. = (501/CFH)
